title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Location permission flow during onboarding does not show expected popup options when enabling Find My Device on Poly Lens app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
4. Reach the "Organized" screen in the onboarding flow.
6. Tap "Don't Allow" on the location permission popup.
8. Log in or continue as Guest.
9. Open the Poly Lens menu by tapping the hamburger icon (☰).
11. Tap "Enable Now" on the Find My Device screen.
12. Grant the Location permission by selecting "While Using the App" (or equivalent).
expected:
After step 5: A location permission popup appears with options "Allow Once" (or "Only This Time" on Android), "Allow While Using App", and "Don't Allow", along with text explaining location usage for finding devices.
After step 10: A permission window appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options, with the Find My Device screen visible in the background.
After step 11: The app navigates to the system Location settings.
After step 13: The Find My Device screen is open and the permission window is dismissed.
